tasting_rooms.name: Antinori nel Chianti Classico Tasting Cellars
tasting_rooms.address: Via Cassia per Siena 133, Loc. Bargino, 50026 San Casciano in Val di Pesa, Italy
tasting_rooms.pricing: Standard tour and 3-wine tasting from EUR 45; Tinaia tour with cru tasting from EUR 80
tasting_rooms.description: Marchesi Antinori's signature Chianti Classico cellar in Bargino, opened 2012. Spiral staircase and rooftop vineyard architecture; flights cover the estate wines including Tignanello and Solaia.

verified.address_quoted: Via Cassia per Siena, 133, Loc. Bargino, 50026 San Casciano Val di Pesa

tasting_rooms.name: Enoteca Italiana Siena
tasting_rooms.address: Fortezza Medicea, Piazza della Liberta, 53100 Siena, Italy
tasting_rooms.pricing: Walk-in tastings from EUR 8 per glass; structured flights of Italian regions from EUR 25
tasting_rooms.description: Italy's oldest official wine promoting organisation, set inside the Medicean Fortress in Siena. Showroom with more than 1,600 Italian wines and a tasting bar across the bastion vaults.

tasting_rooms.name: Le Volpi e l'Uva
tasting_rooms.pricing: Glass pours from EUR 5; sit-down flights from EUR 18 with charcuterie board
tasting_rooms.description: Founded 1992 just behind Ponte Vecchio, this Oltrarno wine bar sources from small independent Tuscan producers. Rotating by-the-glass list shows Chianti Classico, Vernaccia and lesser-known appellations.

tasting_rooms.name: Enoteca Falorni
tasting_rooms.address: Piazza delle Cantine 6, 50022 Greve in Chianti, Italy
tasting_rooms.pricing: Enomatic dispensed pours from EUR 1.50 sample to EUR 12 premium pour; flight cards prepaid
tasting_rooms.description: Tuscany's largest enoteca with over 1,000 wines and 100 simultaneously available for sampling via Enomatic dispensers. Underground vaulted cellars on the site of Greve's first wine merchant.

verified.address_quoted: Piazza delle Cantine, 6, Greve in Chianti, Metropolitan City of Florence, 50022

tasting_rooms.name: Enoteca La Fortezza di Montalcino
tasting_rooms.pricing: Brunello and Rosso flights from EUR 18; vertical tastings from EUR 60 by reservation
tasting_rooms.description: Founded 1980 inside the medieval fortress walls of Montalcino, with Val d'Orcia panoramas from the ramparts. Specialises in Brunello di Montalcino verticals and Rosso di Montalcino flights.

tasting_rooms.name: Enoteca di Piazza Montalcino
tasting_rooms.pricing: Card-system pours from EUR 2 sample; Brunello producer flights from EUR 25
tasting_rooms.description: Family-run since 2004 by the Fedolfi family, with multiple shop fronts across Montalcino. Enomatic-driven tasting room covering 40 Brunello producers side by side; staff sommelier on call.

tasting_rooms.name: Castello Banfi L'Enoteca
tasting_rooms.address: Castello di Poggio alle Mura 1, 53024 Montalcino, Italy
tasting_rooms.pricing: Cellar tour with tasting from EUR 35; vertical Brunello tasting from EUR 90
tasting_rooms.description: The Castello Banfi tasting room inside the 14th-century Poggio alle Mura castle, with the Bottle and Glass Museum next door. Flights cover the full Banfi range from Pinot Grigio to Brunello Riserva Poggio alle Mura.

verified.address_quoted: Castello di Poggio alle Mura, 1, Montalcino, Italy 53024

tasting_rooms.name: Tenuta di Capezzana Tasting Cellars
tasting_rooms.pricing: Cellar tour with 5-wine tasting from EUR 30; full experience with jeep vineyard tour and lunch from EUR 110
tasting_rooms.description: Tasting cellars at one of Tuscany's oldest estates, documented at 804 AD. The Vinsantaia is included on tours; flights cover Carmignano DOCG, Trefiano Riserva, and the Vin Santo di Carmignano DOC.

tasting_rooms.name: Castello di Verrazzano Tasting Cellars
tasting_rooms.address: Via Citille 32, 50022 Greve in Chianti, Italy
tasting_rooms.pricing: Cellar tour and 4-wine tasting from EUR 28; tour with lunch from EUR 65
tasting_rooms.description: Tour the cellars of this organic Greve estate, named for the navigator Giovanni da Verrazzano. Flight programme covers Chianti Classico, Riserva, the Sassello IGT, and Vin Santo of the property.

tasting_rooms.name: Grattamacco Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.pricing: Estate tour and 3-wine tasting from EUR 40; Grattamacco vertical from EUR 90
tasting_rooms.description: Bolgheri's second-oldest winery, with a hilltop tasting terrace overlooking the Tyrrhenian coast. Flights include Bolgheri Rosso DOC, L'Alberello and Grattamacco Bolgheri Superiore DOC.

tasting_rooms.name: Frescobaldi CastelGiocondo Tasting Cellars
tasting_rooms.pricing: Standard cellar visit with 4-wine flight from EUR 45; Lamaione Merlot vertical from EUR 95
tasting_rooms.description: Marchesi Frescobaldi's flagship Montalcino estate, founded as a fortress in 1100. Cellar tour ends in tastings of CastelGiocondo Brunello di Montalcino and the Lamaione single-vineyard Merlot.

tasting_rooms.name: Vernaccia di San Gimignano Wine Experience
tasting_rooms.address: Villa della Rocca di Montestaffoli, 53037 San Gimignano, Italy
tasting_rooms.pricing: Wine museum visit free; tasting flights from EUR 12; producer-led masterclasses from EUR 35
tasting_rooms.description: The consortium tasting room inside the medieval Rocca di Montestaffoli at the top of San Gimignano. Sommelier-led flights cover the DOCG Vernaccia plus the San Gimignano Rosso DOC.
